languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, магос Оксильда передает вам первые результаты работы. По ее словам, прорыв. Зря я беспокоился, что она не отвечала ранее. Вы знаете, эти увлеченные умы..."

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, магос Оксильда передает вам первые результаты работы. По ее словам, прорыв. Зря я беспокоился, что она не отвечала ранее. Вы знаете, эти увлеченные умы..."

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, магос Оксильда передает вам первые результаты работы. По ее словам, прорыв. Зря я беспокоился, что она не отвечала ранее. Вы знаете, эти увлеченные умы..."

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessed minds are..."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessed minds are..."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."

languages.text: 「貴方様、マゴス・オキルダが貴方様へ、彼女の努力の最初の成果を送りました。彼女は、これは突破口だと述べています。彼女が早く反応しなかった時は、心配する必要はありませんでした。このような科学者たちは、仕事に没頭してしまうのです…」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方様、マゴス・オキルダが貴方様へ、彼女の努力の最初の成果を送りました。彼女は、これは突破口だと述べています。彼女が早く反応しなかった時は、心配する必要はありませんでした。このような科学者たちは、仕事に没頭してしまうのです…」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, la magos Oksilda ha transmitido los primeros resultados de su trabajo. Al parecer, es un gran hallazgo. No debería haberme preocupado por su silencio inicial. Ya sabe cómo es la gente obsesiva...».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, la magos Oksilda ha transmitido los primeros resultados de su trabajo. Al parecer, es un gran hallazgo. No debería haberme preocupado por su silencio inicial. Ya sabe cómo es la gente obsesiva...».

languages.text: “大人，贤者奥克西尔达递交了她的首批研究成果，她声称取得了突破。之前迟迟没有回应，我还担心呢。这些贤者一旦沉浸在工作中就……”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."

traits.locale_text: “大人，贤者奥克西尔达递交了她的首批研究成果，她声称取得了突破。之前迟迟没有回应，我还担心呢。这些贤者一旦沉浸在工作中就……”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Oksilda schickt Euch die ersten Ergebnisse ihrer Arbeit. Sie spricht von einem Durchbruch. Ich hätte mir angesichts ihres Schweigens wohl keine Sorgen machen müssen. Ihr wisst ja, wie besessen diese Leute sind ..."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Oksilda schickt Euch die ersten Ergebnisse ihrer Arbeit. Sie spricht von einem Durchbruch. Ich hätte mir angesichts ihres Schweigens wohl keine Sorgen machen müssen. Ihr wisst ja, wie besessen diese Leute sind ..."

languages.text: "Magos Oksilda, çalışmasının ilk sonuçlarını iletti {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Dediğine göre büyük bir atılım yapmışız. Daha önceki sessizliği için endişe etmeye gerek yokmuş. Bilirsiniz, böyle saplantılı tipler..."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."

traits.locale_text: "Magos Oksilda, çalışmasının ilk sonuçlarını iletti {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Dediğine göre büyük bir atılım yapmışız. Daha önceki sessizliği için endişe etmeye gerek yokmuş. Bilirsiniz, böyle saplantılı tipler..."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, la magos Oksilda nous a fait parvenir ses premières conclusions. Elle fait état d'une avancée majeure. Son absence de communication n'avait donc rien d'alarmant. Elle était juste plongée dans ses recherches... »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has transmitted the first results of her work. According to her, it is a breakthrough. I need not have worried about her earlier silence. You know how these obsessive types are..."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, la magos Oksilda nous a fait parvenir ses premières conclusions. Elle fait état d'une avancée majeure. Son absence de communication n'avait donc rien d'alarmant. Elle était juste plongée dans ses recherches... »
